title: senecio oederifolius
intro: Senecio oederifolius, also known as Gray Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio oederifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Senecio oederifolius is traditionally prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be used as a dried herb in teas and infusions for its medicinal properties.
